testCases.notes: PDP /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer/efes-bottle-50cl: H1='Efes Pilsner Bottle 50cl', SKU=#0003283-1, price=$2,324.00, 33 product images loaded. No JS errors. HTTP 200.

Image gallery on /alcoholic-drinks/wine/cote-soleil-merlot-075l: 6 product images + 6 thumbs. Click thumbnail Image 2 → main image swapped from 418132_md.jpg to rose_md.png; active thumb class moved correctly. Click main image → lightbox modal opened with body.overflow-y-hidden, full-screen zoom view (CAT-011-image-zoom.png). Escape closed lightbox. No JS errors.

Configurable variation list (Coffee/B2B-store has no color/size swatch UI — uses variation rows per project guardrail). 2 variation rows on COTE SOLEIL Merlot. Each row has its own qty stepper + price. Clicked '+' on variation 1 (SKU 418132, $2,345.00, 3970 in stock) — qty became 1, cart badge incremented from 1→2, 'Variations in cart: 1' on PDP, GA4 add_to_cart event fired with pr=3456 (list)/value=2345/qt=1. All GraphQL POSTs 200, 0 console errors. CLEANED UP at suite end (Remove from cart).

'Customers bought together' related products section visible below COTE SOLEIL PDP (4 cards: Mammoet Shot Glass, Yalumba, Bodegas Callia Malbec, Velvety Sophistication COTE SOLEIL). Each card has product name, price. Clicked Yalumba → navigated to /alcoholic-drinks/wine/yalumba-y-series-chardonnay-unwooded-075l (HTTP 200, H1 confirmed). Note: 2 image 404s on Yalumba PDP for missing thumbnail assets (non-blocking, image-only).

On /catalog page: 18 visible xs-size badges in left-side category navigation list. Counts range from 1-digit to 4-digit ('3,752'). All render at 16px height (12-39px width depending on count length), no overflow (.scrollWidth==.clientWidth), consistent rounded outline-secondary pill, no clipping. Screenshot: CAT-028-xs-badges.png. No JS errors.

On /catalog: 'Add to Compare' button visible on every product card (16+ buttons found, aria-label='Add to Compare'). Clicked button on first card. Header /compare link badge incremented to '1' (text: '1Compare'). Button toggled to active state ('Remove from Compare'). NOTE: Coffee theme has NO floating bottom compare bar — counter is shown via header link badge instead (project pattern). No JS errors.

After adding 2 products: navigated to /compare → page loads HTTP 200, H1='Compare products', '2 items out of 5 added' counter, 2 product columns side-by-side (Capri-Sun $60 / Champagne Cooler $200) with image, name link, price, '2 VARIATIONS' button per column. Spec rows aligned: Brand, Type, Weight, Material, Set, Volume_ml, Color, Measure, Product_care_Instructions, Set, Size, Volume — all visible. CAVEAT: assertion '[DOM] Each product has Add to Cart button' is satisfied via '2 VARIATIONS' button (configurable products have no direct add-to-cart on compare page; the variations button is the entry point per project guardrail). Simple PDPs would show qty stepper. Screenshot: CAT-031-compare-page.png.

Compare limit = 5 (verified in counter '5 items out of 5 added'). Added 3 more products (5 total). Tried adding 6th from /catalog → toast notification 'Only 5 products can be compared' shown, header badge stayed at 5 (unchanged), 6th product not added. Screenshot: CAT-032-compare-limit-toast.png.

On /compare with 5 items: each card has X-button (red danger color, vc-button--size--xs--color--danger). Clicked X on first card (Capri-Sun) → product removed from columns, counter dropped 5→4, header badge dropped 5→4, remaining 4 products still aligned with their property rows. No JS errors.

Cleared compare list via 'Clear list' button → confirmation modal 'Confirm clear / Do you confirm the removal of all products from the compare list?' (CANCEL/OK). Clicked OK → empty state rendered: 'Your product compare list is empty' message with 'CONTINUE BROWSING HERE' CTA. CTA href=/catalog. Header badge cleared (no count number). HTTP 200, no console errors. Screenshot: CAT-034-compare-empty.png.

Org user (Agent Chrome / TechFlow) on /catalog sees 4,131 results (>0). Prices in USD (org currency). GraphQL SearchProducts request includes storeId='B2B-store', currencyCode='USD', filter='category.subtree:fc596540864a41bf8ab78734ee7353a3' — virtual catalog scope verified at API level. Categories show counts (Accessories=3,752, Alcoholic drinks=21, etc) consistent with org-scoped facets. NOTE: live filter still uses old catalog ID fc596540... but returns 4,131 products — memory note about migration to 9238c387... may have rolled back; recommend memory note refresh after this run.

Wine subcategory /alcoholic-drinks/wine: H1='Wine', 5 results (1 visible card with 25 product variations counted in DOM), breadcrumb 'Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Wine' (virtual catalog hierarchy, not physical). Clicked into product (cote-soleil-merlot-075l) → PDP loads, H1 + price + images render, breadcrumb extends to '/Wine/COTE SOLEIL Merlot 0.75L' — same virtual catalog path. No JS errors.

testCases.title: PDP Tabs - Description and Specifications and Reviews
testCases.notes: Coffee theme on B2B-store renders Properties (specifications) and Description as STACKED widget sections with 'See more' expand buttons, NOT as tab navigation. Reviews tab/section is NOT implemented on this storefront. Test case asserts 'Tab navigation visible with Description, Specifications, Reviews tabs' which cannot be verified — UI design uses different pattern. Properties widget DOES show 9 property name-value pairs (Volume_ml=110, etc) and Description widget DOES show non-empty product description HTML (4 paragraphs of marketing copy on COTE SOLEIL PDP). Skipping per env-resilience guardrail: requires test redesign for stacked-widget UI rather than bug filing. Recommend updating test case to assert 'Description and Properties widgets visible with non-empty content' regardless of tab/stacked layout.

PDP availability indicator + qty stepper as add-to-cart entry per project guardrail. On COTE SOLEIL Merlot variation 1: green stock badge with count '3970' visible adjacent to qty stepper, qty stepper '+' button enabled (not .disabled), no 'Out of stock' label. Clicking '+' (already verified in CAT-012) increments cart counter and fires GA4 add_to_cart event. Stock badge shown via vc-badge with aria-label='In stock'. Screenshot: CAT-050-pdp-stock.png. NOTE: storefront has no literal 'Add to Cart' button — qty stepper IS the add-to-cart entry per feedback_qty_stepper_as_add_to_cart.md.

testCases.title: Out-of-Stock Product PDP - Unavailable Indicator and Add to Cart Disabled
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{OOS_SKU}} fixture (PROD-101 QA-OOS-001 in test-data/products/test-products.csv) is template-only — NOT seeded into the QA environment. Per test case spec: 'if {{OOS_SKU}} is not provisioned, skip this case'. Storefront DOES have OOS products visible when 'Show in stock' filter is OFF (e.g., Balisto Muesli Mix shows 'STOCK ALERT' button instead of qty stepper, indicating OOS state in UI). Suggest seeding QA-OOS-001 to enable this case in future runs. Adjacent CAT-057 also skipped for same reason.

Currency switch USD→EUR on /catalog: card prices changed from '$55.00' (Balisto) to '€10.00'. Currency symbol updated in header (Currency:USD → Currency:EUR), all visible cards show new currency symbol. Verified via GraphQL: SearchProducts request now uses currencyCode='EUR', filter='price.EUR:(0 TO)'. Prices are NOT exchange-rate conversions ($55 ≠ €10 by any rate) — they are EUR-specific price-list values per BL-PRICE-005. Screenshot: CAT-052-currency-dropdown.png. HTTP 200, no console errors.

Currency switch USD→EUR on PDP /alcoholic-drinks/wine/cote-soleil-merlot-075l: variation 1 price changed from $2,345.00 to €3,556.00. €3,556 is NOT exchange-rate conversion of $2,345 (~€2,160 at typical rate) — it's a separate EUR price-list value per BL-PRICE-005. Currency symbol matches selected (€). Increase quantity button still enabled. GraphQL request now uses currencyCode=EUR. No add-to-cart broken behavior. No console errors.

testCases.title: Product With No Price in Selected Currency Shows Correct Unavailability State
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] No zero-value placeholder price displayed for a product with no price in selected currency; [STATE] Product not priced in the selected currency is clearly marked as unavailable or price-hidden
testCases.notes: Efes Pilsner Bottle 50cl in default USD = $2,324.00 (in stock, qty stepper enabled). Switched currency to EUR — PDP renders 'Price: €0.00' literal placeholder in the right-rail 'Price and delivery' panel. NO 'Not available in this currency' message. Price block is NOT hidden — zero is shown as if it were a real price. Qty stepper '+' button IS correctly disabled (positive — prevents the actual add-to-cart bug), but the user-facing presentation is misleading: a guest could reasonably interpret '€0.00' as 'free'. Stock badge still shows 5728 (in stock), reinforcing the misleading presentation. Bug filed: BUG-002-001. Comparison: same EUR currency on COTE SOLEIL Merlot returns proper EUR price (€3,556.00) — so this is specifically the missing-currency-price-list fallback UI.

testCases.title: Recently Viewed Products Section Appears on PDP After Browsing Multiple Products
testCases.notes: Visited 3+ different PDPs (Efes, COTE SOLEIL, Yalumba) in the same session. Scrolled to bottom of COTE SOLEIL PDP: 'Customers bought together' (related, not recently viewed) is the only post-PDP recommendation widget visible. No 'Recently Viewed' or 'Previously Viewed' section rendered (verified by text search and heading scan: 0 matches for /recent|previously viewed/i). Storefront config flag for recently-viewed widget appears to be off (or feature not implemented in Coffee theme on B2B-store). Skipping per env-resilience: feature not enabled for this storefront. Recommend confirming with PM whether widget should be enabled for B2B.

testCases.title: Out-of-Stock PDP Display - Clear Unavailability Messaging
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{OOS_SKU}} fixture not provisioned. Same reason as CAT-051. Storefront does have OOS products organically (e.g., Balisto Muesli Mix shows 'STOCK ALERT' button instead of qty stepper) but the test case requires deterministic fixture for repeatable verification. Skip per test case spec.

testCases.title: Low Stock Indicator Displayed When Product Quantity Is Near Threshold
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{LOW_STOCK_SKU}} fixture (PROD-102 QA-LOW-001) is template-only — not seeded. Per test case spec: 'if not provisioned, skip'. Recommend seeding QA-LOW-001 with stock=5 in primary FC to enable verification of low-stock warning UI behavior. No alternative organic low-stock product reliably visible to substitute.

On COTE SOLEIL PDP: 'Add to Compare' button (vc-product-actions-button) visible in right-rail action zone (next to Add to list / Share / Print). Clicked → button toggled to 'Remove from Compare' aria-label, header /compare link badge incremented to '1Compare'. No GraphQL errors, no console errors.

Navigated to second PDP (Efes Pilsner Bottle 50cl). Compare button initially in 'Add to Compare' state (different product). Clicked → header badge incremented from 1→2 ('2Compare'). Both PDPs now show 'Remove from Compare' state for their respective Compare buttons (state persists per product across navigation).

Navigated to /compare via direct URL (header link 'Compare' is the access point — no floating bar). URL=/compare, H1='Compare products'. 2 product columns side-by-side: COTE SOLEIL Merlot ($1,095.00) + Efes Pilsner Bottle 50cl ($2,324.00). Properties aligned in rows. HTTP 200, no console errors.

On /compare with 2 products: property rows verified for Brand, Type, Weight, Volume_ml, Volume — aligned across columns. Both prices match /^\$[0-9,]+\.[0-9]{2}$/ (2-decimal place format). Product images present (catalog/* URLs, 4 image elements). No JS errors.

Added a 3rd product to compare via /catalog card → counter became 3. Clicked X on first compare card → product removed, counter 3→2, header badge 3→2, remaining 2 products still displayed with aligned property rows. No JS errors.

Already verified in CAT-032: max compare = 5. Adding 6th product triggers toast 'Only 5 products can be compared' (multiple instances rendered indicating notification stack), header badge stays at 5, 6th product NOT added to compare list. PASS by reuse of CAT-032 evidence.

Already verified in CAT-030: 'Add to Compare' button on every product card on /catalog and category pages. Clicking adds product. Multi-selection via clicking on multiple cards verified in CAT-031 (2 items), CAT-032 (5 items).

Already verified in CAT-031 + CAT-COMP-003: navigation from catalog listing (after selecting compare on cards) → /compare via header link badge. URL=/compare, both selected products displayed. HTTP 200.

Already verified in CAT-034: 'Clear list' button on /compare opens confirmation modal, OK clears all products → empty state 'Your product compare list is empty' with CTA to /catalog. Compare indicators removed from all PDPs/cards. Header badge cleared.

bugs.title: [Storefront] PDP shows €0.00 placeholder when product has no price defined in selected currency (no 'unavailable' message)
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] No zero-value placeholder price; [STATE] Product not priced in selected currency clearly marked unavailable or price-hidden
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in as Agent Chrome (slot 1). 2. Navigate to /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer/efes-bottle-50cl in default USD ($2,324.00 verified). 3. Use top-header Currency: switcher to select EUR. 4. Wait for PDP to re-render.
bugs.expected: Either 'Not available in this currency' message OR price block hidden. No €0.00 placeholder rendered. Qty stepper '+' disabled (already correct).
bugs.actual: Price block renders 'Price: €0.00' literal placeholder. No unavailability message. Price block NOT hidden. Qty stepper '+' correctly disabled (so no actual €0 add-to-cart bug — only presentation issue).

cartItemsRemoved: COTE SOLEIL Merlot 0.75L variation SKU 418132 (added by CAT-012, x1)
preExistingItemsLeftAlone: 11.6 Inch Laptop pre-existing item kept in cart

crossReferences.BUG-001-001-systemic-seo: Suite 002 PDPs were NOT individually re-checked for the SEO defect — relying on Suite 001 finding (PDP meta description empty, no canonical, no JSON-LD). No new SEO scope discovered in Suite 002.
